NVDA.title: AGNC Investment declares $0.12 monthly dividend for July By Investing.com
NVDA.summary: AGNC Investment Corp. announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per common share for July 2026, payable on August 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 31, 2026. The company boasts a dividend yield of nearly 13% and has maintained payments for 19 consecutive years. AGNC Investment (NASDAQ:AGNC) also reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations.

NVDA.title: Dell Technologies director Egon Durban, Silver Lake entities sell $29.9 million in stock
NVDA.summary: Dell Technologies director Egon Durban and affiliated Silver Lake entities sold approximately $29.9 million worth of Dell Class C Common Stock on July 6, 2026. The sales involved 72,766 shares at prices ranging from $405.36 to $418.49. Despite a 241% return over the past year, InvestingPro analysis suggests the shares may be overvalued at current levels.

NVDA.title: Equinix (EQIX) AI Partnerships Keep Valuation In Focus
NVDA.summary: Equinix (EQIX), a data center company, has partnered with Cisco, Nvidia, and F5 to help enterprises deploy AI safely and scalably across multicloud and hybrid environments. The company's AI initiatives are feeding a long-term positive narrative, leading to a strong year-to-date share price return despite recent short-term pullbacks. The article discusses Equinix's investment potential, noting that while it appears undervalued on a discounted cash flow basis, its P/E ratio is significantly higher than industry averages.

NVDA.title: Equinix (EQIX) AI Partnerships Keep Valuation In Focus
NVDA.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is actively pursuing AI partnerships with companies like Cisco, Nvidia, and F5 to support AI deployment across hybrid and multicloud environments. Despite recent short-term share price dips, the company has seen strong year-to-date and one-year returns, reinforcing a positive long-term narrative driven by AI and cloud infrastructure demand. While a discounted cash flow analysis suggests Equinix is undervalued, trading at $1,197.11 against a last close of $1,015.97, its P/E ratio of 70.9x is considerably higher than industry averages, prompting a need for investors to assess potential valuation gaps and risks.

NVDA.title: Is QUALCOMM’s AI Pivot and Index Exit Altering The Investment Case For QUALCOMM (QCOM)?
NVDA.summary: QUALCOMM's recent removal from Russell indices and its strong pivot towards AI, including the unveiling of the Dragonfly AI data center platform, expanded partnerships with Hugging Face for unified edge-to-cloud AI, and deepfake detection through Scam.ai, signal a strategic shift from a handset-focused company to an end-to-end AI infrastructure provider. This article explores how these developments impact QUALCOMM's investment narrative, including its projected revenue and earnings growth, fair value, and the balance between AI momentum and competitive pressures. The company's future success hinges on its ability to profitably scale its new AI-centric businesses, moving beyond its traditional handset dependence.

NVDA.title: Dell Technologies director Egon Durban, Silver Lake entities sell $29.9 million in stock
NVDA.summary: Egon Durban, a director at Dell Technologies (NASDAQ:DELL) and co-CEO of Silver Lake Group, L.L.C., along with affiliated Silver Lake entities, sold approximately $29.9 million worth of Dell Class C Common Stock. The shares were sold on July 6, 2026, with prices ranging from $405.36 to $418.49 per share. These transactions occurred after certain reporting persons converted Class B shares to Class C shares.

NVDA.title: Western Digital Corp Stock (WDC) Closed Up by 3.57% on Jul 8: What Investors Need To Know
NVDA.summary: Western Digital Corp (WDC) stock closed up 3.57% on July 8th, driven by strong fundamental tailwinds, favorable analyst adjustments, and a rebound from a sector-wide pullback. Goldman Sachs notably raised its price target to $650, citing the company's strong position in the AI-driven storage market. The company

NVDA.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Closed Up by 3.85% on Jul 8: Key Drivers Unveiled
NVDA.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) saw its stock rise by 3.85% on July 8th, driven by significant institutional buying, robust demand from AI data centers, and the successful qualification of its Mozaic platform by major cloud providers. Analysts have raised price targets for STX, citing generative AI growth and strong earnings potential, despite existing challenges like high debt and premium valuation.

MSFT.title: FTC Reaches Settlement That Brings Right-To-Repair To John Deere Farm Equipment
MSFT.summary: The FTC, along with five states, has settled with Deere & Company, mandating that John Deere provide farmers and independent repair providers with the same repair resources, including software capabilities, that it offers authorized dealers for the next 10 years. This settlement allows farmers greater flexibility in repairing their equipment, addressing previous unfair practices that limited repair options and imposed higher costs. Right-to-repair advocates hail this as a significant victory for farmers and the broader movement toward a "more fixable world."

MSFT.title: The S&P 500 Is Nearing Record Highs, but This 1 Unstoppable ETF Could Be the Smarter Buy Right Now
MSFT.summary: The S&P 500 is close to record highs, but its valuation is elevated. The Invesco Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQM) is presented as a potentially smarter buy due to its direct exposure to AI, cloud computing, and semiconductors, which are driving current market growth. While QQQM offers strong growth potential, investors should be aware of its concentration, volatility, and sensitivity to interest rates.

MSFT.title: 4 hidden dependencies that keep legacy systems alive
MSFT.summary: This article identifies four hidden dependencies—processes, reports, workflows, and historical data—that make it difficult to retire legacy IT systems, even when newer software is available. It emphasizes that modernization plans often fail to account for these subtle but critical ties that keep old systems operational. The article suggests that discovering and addressing these dependencies is essential before any shutdown plan can be effectively implemented.

MSFT.title: Arista Networks Stock Eyes AI Upside As Wall Street Hikes Targets
MSFT.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) stock is trading higher due to strong AI-driven networking demand, with Wall Street analysts raising price targets up to $200. The company's new 1.6Tbps 7060XE7 switches are a key catalyst, expanding its Etherlink AI fabric for rack-scale AI infrastructure, supported by partnerships with major tech companies. Despite some insider selling, the overall sentiment remains positive, driven by strong fundamentals and upcoming AI-focused catalysts.

MSFT.title: SAP SE Stock (SAP) Moved Down by 3.18% on Jul 8: Key Drivers Unveiled
MSFT.summary: SAP SE (SAP) stock dropped by 3.18% on July 8th, driven by geopolitical tensions, a broader market sell-off, and investor concerns over the company's aggressive pivot to AI. Despite implementing hiring freezes and spending cuts to prioritize AI investments, analysts worry about potential margin compression and the uncertain monetization of AI, especially with a shift to consumption-based pricing models. Technical indicators show neutral to buy signals, but ongoing antitrust litigation and competitive disadvantages in AI acquisitions also weigh on sentiment.

MSFT.title: Qualcomm AI Factory Bet Comes as the Semiconductor Pendulum Swings
MSFT.summary: Qualcomm is strategically pivoting from a mobile-chip company to a broader "AI factory accelerator" by building a comprehensive AI infrastructure platform. Despite the stock's recent decline due to broader semiconductor market skepticism, Qualcomm aims to secure a significant position in the AI data center market, targeting $15 billion in revenue by fiscal 2029 through diversified offerings like connectivity, custom silicon, and AI inference accelerators. This move mirrors its successful automotive diversification playbook, aiming to capitalize on the evolving AI landscape led by inference workloads and power efficiency.

MSFT.title: BofA extends first $520 million loan to OpenAI ahead of IPO, source says
MSFT.summary: Bank of America has granted OpenAI a $520 million credit line, marking its first loan to the AI company as it prepares for an initial public offering (IPO). This move positions BofA as one of OpenAI's major lenders and strengthens its presence in AI-related capital markets financing. BofA has also been involved in significant AI fundraising activities, including SpaceX's recent IPO, and is reportedly seeking advisory roles for OpenAI's and Anthropic's planned IPOs.

MSFT.title: Akamai Stock Gains Momentum On AI Security And LayerX Deal
MSFT.summary: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) stock has gained 6.45% due to upbeat earnings, strong cloud demand, and strategic advancements in AI security. The company launched a unified agentic framework for AI agent identity and trust, completed a $205M acquisition of LayerX to bolster its Zero Trust security, and received Microsoft’s "Solutions Partner with certified software" badge for its API Security. Oppenheimer reaffirmed an Outperform rating with a $180 target, highlighting the underappreciated growth in cloud and AI inferencing.

GOOGL.title: AGNC Investment declares $0.12 monthly dividend for July By Investing.com
GOOGL.summary: AGNC Investment Corp. announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per common share for July 2026, payable on August 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 31, 2026. The company boasts a dividend yield of nearly 13% and has maintained payments for 19 consecutive years. AGNC Investment (NASDAQ:AGNC) also reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations.

GOOGL.title: FTC Reaches Settlement That Brings Right-To-Repair To John Deere Farm Equipment
GOOGL.summary: The FTC, along with five states, has settled with Deere & Company, mandating that John Deere provide farmers and independent repair providers with the same repair resources, including software capabilities, that it offers authorized dealers for the next 10 years. This settlement allows farmers greater flexibility in repairing their equipment, addressing previous unfair practices that limited repair options and imposed higher costs. Right-to-repair advocates hail this as a significant victory for farmers and the broader movement toward a "more fixable world."

GOOGL.title: 8 more Houston Walmart stores now offering drone delivery
GOOGL.summary: Walmart has expanded its drone delivery service in the Houston area by adding eight more stores to its network, bringing the total to 13 locations. This expansion, a partnership with Wing, makes drone delivery available to over one million Houston-area residents. Customers can place orders through the Walmart or Wing app, with drones delivering items in minutes by lowering them via tether directly to their homes.

GOOGL.title: Here Are the First Three Stocks I'm Buying if the Stock Market Enters a Bear Market
GOOGL.summary: The article identifies three top stocks—Alphabet, Amazon, and Taiwan Semiconductor—that an investor plans to buy during a bear market. These companies are highlighted for their robust business models, dominant market positions in their respective sectors (search, cloud computing, e-commerce, and chip manufacturing), and resilience to economic downturns, promising a strong rebound post-bear market. A caveat is noted for Taiwan Semiconductor regarding geopolitical risks.

GOOGL.title: Seth Klarman Stock Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy
GOOGL.summary: This article identifies Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW) as one of the best stocks in Seth Klarman's portfolio. It details WTW's new RiskAgility Financial Modeler (FM) version, which incorporates GPU execution to help insurers run high-volume projections faster and more cost-effectively. The company believes this enhancement, combined with existing AI features, will enable quicker financial and capital-modeling decisions.

GOOGL.title: Hertz and Saia Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
GOOGL.summary: Shares of Hertz (HTZ) and Saia (SAIA) plummeted after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over," which sent oil prices above $75. Transportation companies are heavily impacted by fuel costs, making them sensitive to such geopolitical news. Hertz, already facing challenges like a cut profit forecast and plans to raise capital, saw its stock further decline by 6.9%.

GOOGL.title: Nvidia backed by Bank of America as analysts see AI leadership supporting further growth
GOOGL.summary: Bank of America has reiterated its 'Buy' rating on Nvidia, stating that the chipmaker is well-positioned to maintain its dominant share in AI infrastructure spending. Analysts believe Nvidia's current valuation does not fully reflect its strong AI franchise and that concerns regarding gross margin pressure, custom AI chip competition, and capital allocation are overly cautious. The firm expects Nvidia to sustain high gross margins and continue gaining share despite growing competition.

GOOGL.title: 3 Top-Ranked Stocks Riding on Massive AI Infrastructure Spending
GOOGL.summary: The article highlights the massive and accelerating spending on AI infrastructure, driven by advancements in AI technologies and the need for robust data centers. It identifies Amazon (AMZN), Alphabet (GOOGL), and Hewlett-Packard Enterprise (HPE) as top-ranked stocks poised to benefit from this trend, detailing their strategies and capital expenditures in the AI space. Analysts predict significant earnings growth for these companies as they capitalize on the expanding AI market.
